description_for_human: Order custom cakes, cupcakes, and desserts from Happy Cake in Sugar Land, TX.
description_for_model: API for browsing and ordering cakes from Happy Cake US bakery. Use /api/agents/catalog to see products, /api/agents/availability to check dates, and POST /api/agents/order-intent to place orders. Always check availability before ordering. Prices are in cents.
